lex.bot.promptspecification.AllowInterru.Docs: Indicates whether the user can interrupt a speech prompt from the bot.

lex.bot.promptspecification.MaxRetries.Docs: The maximum number of times the bot tries to elicit a response from the user using this prompt

lex.bot.promptspecification.MessageGroup.Docs: A collection of responses that Amazon Lex can send to the user. Amazon Lex chooses the actual response to send at runtime.
